gate_question_self: Have you been to the clinic before?
gate_question_other: Have they been to the clinic before?

new_patient.verbatim_script: As you're new, I'll need to set you up for a new patient consultation first -- Dr Leoni will guide the best course of action from there.

menu_list: We offer consultations for Autologous Platelet Rich Fibrin, Facial Lines and Wrinkles, Facial Volume and Contouring, Professional Skin Peels, Skin Quality and Micro-Hydration, LED Light Therapy Assessment and Management, and Liftera.
not_offered_first_use: We don't offer [term] here. We offer consultations for Autologous Platelet Rich Fibrin, Facial Lines and Wrinkles, Facial Volume and Contouring, Professional Skin Peels, Skin Quality and Micro-Hydration, LED Light Therapy, and Liftera. Would you like to book one of those?

categories.name: PRF
categories.variant_question_self: Were you after our PRF facial or hair package, or just looking for a touch-up?
categories.variant_question_other: Were they after our PRF facial or hair package, or just looking for a touch-up?

options.label: Facial package
options.appointment_type: PRF facial package (4 sessions of PRF + micro needling + LED light, 4-6 weeks apart)

options.label: Hair package
options.appointment_type: PRF hair package (6 sessions of PRF + Microneedling + LED light 6 weeks apart)

options.label: Touch-up
